team.name: Babita Gautam
team.title: Co-Founder, Customer Experience
team.description: Babita helps customers choose pieces for gifting and daily wear, with a careful eye for design, presentation, and comfort.

team.name: Mohan Sunar
team.title: Co-Founder, Master Craftsman
team.description: With more than 30 years of jewelry-making experience, Mohan oversees bench work, finishing, and the quality checks behind every piece.

team.name: Aadarsh Gautam
team.title: Co-Founder, Online Experience
team.description: Aadarsh leads the storefront, merchandising, and service experience so traditional craftsmanship feels easy to discover and buy online.

story.title: Our Story
story.content:
Aashish Jewellers grew from a family tradition of making and selling jewelry with care. We work from Butwal and focus on pieces that feel giftable, wearable, and rooted in craftsmanship.

Our collection balances classic silver styling with cleaner, modern presentation so customers can find pieces that suit daily wear, celebrations, and thoughtful gifting.

Every piece is chosen with finish, comfort, and long-term wear in mind. The goal is simple: make traditional craftsmanship feel trustworthy, clear, and easy to buy online.

steps.title: Design Inspiration
steps.description: We start with silhouettes customers actually want to wear, then shape the details around classic forms, gifting moments, and long-term comfort.

steps.title: Silver Selection
steps.description: We focus on dependable silver quality and finishes that hold up well in daily wear, gifting, and occasional dressing.

steps.title: Handcrafting
steps.description: Our makers finish, set, and polish each piece with close attention to proportion, shine, and how it sits when worn.

steps.title: Quality Assurance
steps.description: Before a piece reaches the storefront, we review its finish, comfort, and presentation so the customer gets something that feels ready to wear or gift.
